title: Indian-Style Pickled Mediterranean Flatbread
description: A fusion Indian dish using crispy flatbread topped with pickled Mediterranean vegetables.
instructions: Place the flatbread on a baking sheet.
Sprinkle the garam masala over the flatbread.
Drizzle the olive oil over the flatbread.
Bake in the preheated oven for 5-7 minutes or until crispy.
While the flatbread is baking, mix the pickled Mediterranean vegetables and lemon juice in a bowl.
Sprinkle the chopped cilantro over the pickled vegetables.
Once the flatbread is ready, top it with the pickled Mediterranean vegetables.
